checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking an All Who Wander by  Kings & Daughters Brewery at Western State Hospital
checkins.description: This is great!  Love the story and awesome beer!  💯🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a Busy Season by  Kings & Daughters Brewery at Western State Hospital
checkins.description: Love it, always down with a solid NEIPA!! And as always amazing story and can art … just awesome! 💯🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a Source To Sea West Coast IPA by  Icicle Brewing Company at Western State Hospital
checkins.description: Really nice!  Always down with a collab!!  West Coast FTW! 💯🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a Spellbinder by  Wren House Brewing Company at La Vecina
checkins.description: Love it!  💯🍺🤙

checkins.description: Classic West Coast!! 💯🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a S2N by  E9 Brewing Co. at Western State Hospital

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a 8th Anniversary IPA by  Single Hill Brewing at Western State Hospital
checkins.description: Really nice! 💯🍺🤙

checkins.description: This is nice! 💯🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a Moral Codes by  The Lost Abbey at Peaks and Pints Bottleshop, Taproom and Eatery
checkins.description: Interesting 💯🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking an Enchantments Hazy IPA Series - No. 26 - Jabberwocky by  Icicle Brewing Company at Western State Hospital
checkins.description: Oh this is so good!! 💯🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a Castaway IPA by  Kona Brewing Hawaii at Western State Hospital
checkins.description: Birthday dinner IPA. Ocean table at sunset, tiki torches, tempura tofu, Kohala Coast. Episode 47 ended at midnight on my birthday. Pele brought the fireworks, Kona brought the beer. 💯🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a Hop Island by  Honolulu Beerworks at Western State Hospital
checkins.description: Amarillo and Citra bringing tangerine, grapefruit and pineapple over a solid bitter pine base. Desert island pick. Drank this on my 56th birthday week while Kilauea was erupting 50 miles away. Hawaii does not mess around. 💯🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a Big Swell IPA by  Maui Brewing Company at Western State Hospital
checkins.description: Dry hopped tropical citrus. Bursting is the right word. 🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking an Overboard by  Big Island Brewhaus at Western State Hospital
checkins.description: Big Island. Tropical pine aromas, silky malt, lingering hop bitterness. Brewed about 20 minutes from where I was drinking it. Local in the best possible sense. 💯🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking an IPA by  Ola Brew Company at Western State Hospital
checkins.description: West Coast IPA, citrusy and herbal, sharp resinous hops. Solid, clean, exactly what you want at 2pm on the Kohala Coast after a morning of volcanic activity. 🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a Superdelic IPA by  Ola Brew Company at Western State Hospital
checkins.description: New Zealand hops doing their thing. Tropical, red berry, citrus. Ola Brew earning it. 🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a Hoptopus Double IPA by  Ola Brew Company
checkins.description: Citrus and lilikoi, hazy glow. Desert island pick. If I’m stranded on a Hawaiian island — which felt relevant — this is coming with me. 💯🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a Kua Bay IPA by  Kona Brewing Hawaii at Lobby Bar @ DoubleTree
checkins.description: Perfect after a long day out and about! 💯🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a Widowmaker by  Backcountry Brewing at Tap & Barrel Convention Centre
checkins.description: Love it! 💯🍺🤙

checkins.title: Brooks G. is drinking a Daytime Karaoke by  Superflux Beer Company at Superflux Beer Company
checkins.description: Love it!  💯🍺🤙
